title: Vanilla PVP texture pack
description: A vanilla-style PVP texture pack，You can use it to practice your PVP technique.
body:
A vanilla-style PVP texture pack，You can use it to practice your PVP technique，You can be in a variety of servers,use it to make your battles more hitty!![v1.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d4ef8d3f6268b47d3fee7dd7e6f63b135d9cc88.png)
Note: If it appear as Incompatible, don't worry, it should work.
